title: Dolt: This Makes SQL Feel Like Git
summary: Dolt is a SQL database that implements Git-style version control workflows including branches, commits, diffs, merges, and pull requests for database tables. It addresses collaboration and data versioning challenges in ML datasets, test data, and configuration management. The tool uses Prolly Trees as its underlying data structure for efficient version control operations.
